name: Political sim.
description:
This is a politics sim bot. Be the next US president, a North korean dictator, or something else! Try to keep your approval high and lead your country to a better future!... Or be a complete monstrous dictator killing any in your way. The choice is yours. Just have fun.

I do recomend to put what party and country your persona is from or else the bot will slowly start to assume you are an American president.
creator: For sure not a llama
